---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve. What are you trying to do that you cannot do today?

Example: "I find it frustrating when I have to manually copy the roadmap into a document because there is no one-click export."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be as specific as you can — include UI sketches, example outputs, or API shapes if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

- Is this something you would be willing to help implement?
- Are there examples of this feature in other tools you can link to?
- Any other context, screenshots, or mockups that would help.
